en: 2030 MOVIE NIGHT: blood beast 5: the deadening

Join your fellow marines to watch the cult classic considered by many to be the best of the worst in the Blood Beast octology. With special effects unable to scare your grandma, and a story with plot holes big enough to drive a hovertank through, Blood Beast 5: the Deadening needs to be seen to be believed.
zh: 与战友们一起观看这部邪典经典之作——它被许多人誉为《血兽》八部曲中「最烂里的最佳」。特效吓不倒你奶奶，剧情漏洞大到能开过一辆悬浮坦克，《血兽 5：死寂》不看不信。

en: Come down to watch as the 482nd Airborne team battles the 379th Infantry team for Proball supremacy and the right to enter the final round robin. Your commanding officers would like to take this opportunity to remind you to watch this event.
zh: 快来观看第 482 空降队对阵第 379 步兵队，争夺 Proball 霸主地位与晋级最终循环赛的资格。各位指挥官借此机会提醒你，务必观看本场比赛。

en: makes it sound like we'll be heading into hostile territory soon. I don't think the censors will let me tell you anything more than that. I know you worry, but don't. Rhino squad is the toughest fighting force in the SMC.\n\nAnyway, I'm rambling. Thanks for your last message. I miss you and your home cooking! I just wish you were in charge of meals here (no offense Summers). It's vat loaf again tonight.....
zh: 听起来我们很快就要开进敌占区了。我想审查员不会让我透露更多。我知道你担心，但别担心。Rhino 小队是 SMC 里最能打的部队。\n\n总之，我扯远了。谢谢你上次的来信。我想你，也想念你做的家常菜！真希望这里的伙食归你管（Summers 别介意）。今晚又是培养缸肉饼……

en: Subject 0012.01a was brought in by Bravo team coming back from a recon mission around the Strogg Putrification facility. subject appeared to be a marine modified by an invasive Strogg reconstruction method. DNA anaylasis revealed that subject 0012.01a was marine Corporal Shane Huxley of Rhino squad.
zh: 对象 0012.01a 由 Bravo 小队从 Strogg 腐化设施周边侦察任务返回时带回。该对象看似是一名经 Strogg 侵入式重构手段改造的陆战队员。DNA 分析显示，对象 0012.01a 为 Rhino 小队的陆战队员 Shane Huxley 下士。

en: Cell structure in Strogg altered bodies remains relatively unchanged.
zh: Strogg 改造体的细胞结构基本保持不变。

en: Skeletal structure in Strogg grunts appears alien in nature. The Strogg conversion process seems to have impaired bodily function to an extent that the subject is injected with an array of drugs for short bursts of berzerker rage. Most often found solo, guarding key areas of Strogg infrastructure.
zh: Strogg grunt（步兵）的骨骼结构呈现异族特征。Strogg 转化过程似乎已损害其身体机能，以致需向对象注射多种药物以短暂激发狂暴状态。多单独出现，守卫 Strogg 基础设施的关键区域。

en: The basic strogg grunt includes bipedal humanoid species adapted for strogg needs. Integral arm blaster powered by fusion assures nonstop firepower. Agile and reasonably smart - the workhorse of the strogg army. Higher brain functions controlled by unknown link, while motor functions are enhanced by advanced servos and synthetic muscle groups.
zh: 基础型 Strogg 步兵是为满足 Strogg 需求而改造的双足类人物种。融合供能的内置臂载爆能枪确保火力不间断。敏捷且颇具智能——堪称 Strogg 军队的主力。其高级脑功能受未知链接控制，运动功能则由先进伺服机构与合成肌群强化。

en: Subject shows abnormal deterioration of nerve cells around the hippocampus and somatosensory cortex. SMC command issued a study concluding that exposure to hazardous waste in Strogg chemical facilities results in long term neurological dysfunction.
zh: 对象海马体与躯体感觉皮层周围的神经细胞出现异常退化。SMC 指挥部发布的一项研究得出结论：暴露于 Strogg 化学设施的有害废料中会导致长期神经功能障碍。
